title: Universal Rain Cover for Pushchair Stroller, Pram Rain Cover with Window, Baby Buggy Cover Protect from Sun Dust Snow
features: Multi-Functional Protection: Our universal rain cover for pushchair is made of food-grade EVA material, ensuring the comfort and safety of your baby during use, protecting your baby from rain, wind, snow and dust.
Widely Compatible: The buggy cover is easy to install and remove, and is suitable for most single strollers, kids pushchairs, pocket travel buggies, jogging strollers, prams, and more.

Breathable & Clear: The stroller rain cover is designed with placed air holes on both sides to ensure optimal air circulation. The transparent rain cover allows the baby to see the outside world clearly, and parents can also observe the baby's condition at any time.

Exceptional Quality: This stroller rain cover is very soft and can be folded with the stroller, making it more convenient to use. There are durable fasteners to fix the rain stroller cover to the stroller, and there is no need to worry that the wind will blow away the waterproof stroller cover.

Travel essentials: The stroller rain cover can be folded and stored in the basket or organizer of your pushchair, buggy or stroller, which can also give you peace of mind in unexpected weather conditions. It is definitely one of the best choices for family on the go.
